description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: During the exam period, find the library branch that stays open latest on Sundays, add it to your favorites, and then open it from your favorites list.

tasks.instruction: For undergraduate borrowers, find the maximum number of general collection books allowed and save that number as your personal borrowing goal in your profile.

target_names: Undergraduate borrowing policy for Books (general collection)

tasks.instruction: Find a study space that allows covered drinks and cold snacks but not hot meals, add it to your saved study spots, and set it as your primary spot.

tasks.instruction: Using the study room booking system, reserve a two-hour group study room at the largest campus library for four people on the next Wednesday from 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM with a whiteboard, and complete the booking form with the provided name, university ID, and group size.

tasks.instruction: Submit a new interlibrary loan request for a book chapter using the given book and chapter details, choose the pickup location at the main service desk of the largest campus library, set the need-by date to two weeks from today, and send the request.

expected_values.book_title: Designing with the Mind in Mind

tasks.instruction: From the equipment fines list, filter to items with a daily overdue fine below $5, then add the item with the lowest daily fine to your low-risk items list and open that list.

tasks.instruction: Find an online workshop about citation management happening within the next 7 days that starts at or after 4:00 PM and register for it using the provided name and university email address.

tasks.instruction: On the psychology subject guide, add the first three recommended databases to your resources, then in your account filter resources to psychology and move those three into your favorites folder for your introductory psychology course.

tasks.instruction: Use the accessibility services request form to send a message asking about extended e-book loan periods due to a documented disability, providing the given name, email address, and preferred contact method.

expected_values.request_details: Requesting information on extended loan periods for e-books due to documented disability.
